---
title: "Contact"
---

**Chad Weldy Lab**  
Stanford University School of Medicine  

Feel free to reach out to me for any questions, ideas, collaborations, or if you want to get out for a run or bike ride around Stanford!

Email: weldyc@stanford.edu

[X](<https://x.com/ChadSWeldy>)

[Bluesky](<https://bsky.app/profile/chadweldy.bsky.social>)

[LinkedIn](<https://www.linkedin.com/in/chad-weldy-m-d-ph-d-a2a66965/>)

![](images/Hoover.jpg){
  width=100%
  style="border-radius:16px; margin-top:2rem;"
}
